Package index

Tree Comparison

Functions to compare topologies, support values, and branch lengths between phylogenetic trees.

sharedNodes()
sharedNodes
uniqueNodes()
uniqueNodes
retrodictNodes()
retrodictNodes
compareBranchLength()
compareBranchLength
summaryTopologicalDist()
summaryTopologicalDist
multiRF()
multiRF
multiCID()
multiCID
multiSPR()
multiSPR
normalizedSPR()
normalizedSPR

Tree Handling

Functions for mapping support values and branch lengths across trees, and for writing tree files.

mapSupport()
mapSupport
mapBranchLength()
mapBranchLength
addREP()
addREP
writeTree()
writeTree
howManyPolytomies()
How many Polytomies in a tree

Taxon Management

Functions for renaming and filtering taxa across matrices and trees.

renameTaxa()
renameTaxa
filterTaxaList()
filterTaxaList

Matrix Handling

Functions for filtering, concatenating, and converting phylogenetic matrices (NEXUS / TNT formats).

concatenate()
concatenate
filterMissing()
filterMissing
filterInvariants()
filterInvariants
filterSharedTaxa()
filterSharedTaxa
splitNoStates()
splitNoStates
splitOrdFromUnord()
splitOrdFromUnord
nexus2tnt()
nexus2tnt
tnt2nexus()
tnt2nexus

Internal / Miscellaneous

Internal helpers and placeholder functions.

hello()
Hello, World!
